SaintapediaDrilldownSidebarEnabled.description: Enable the sidebar (flex) layout for Special:Drilldown. Set false to disable entirely and fall back to Cargo defaults. Overridable via MediaWiki:SaintapediaDrilldown-config.

SaintapediaDrilldownSidebarWidth.description: Width of the filter sidebar in pixels (desktop). Valid range: 120–800. Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownShowFilterChips.description: Show active-filter chips above the results area. Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownStickyFilters.description: Make the filter sidebar sticky while the user scrolls results. Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownStickyChips.description: Make the active-filter chips bar sticky on desktop. Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownPillChips.description: Use pill-shaped filter chips. Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownCollapsibleSections.description: Make each filter field a collapsible section with a clickable heading. Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownSectionsStartCollaps.description: When true, filter sections start collapsed (unless they have an active filter or a stored preference). Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownLargeHeadings.description: Use larger page and filter section headings. Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownMobileBreakpoint.description: Viewport width (px) below which the layout switches to stacked / mobile mode. Valid range: 320–1600. Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownTheme.description: Built-in theme preset: default, soft, or compact. Overridable via wiki config.

SaintapediaDrilldownConfigPage.description: MediaWiki namespace page (without NS prefix) holding JSON UX overrides. Empty string disables wiki config.
